content: PromptSignIn is a component from @gravity-ui/blog-constructor that displays a prompt encouraging unauthenticated users to sign in. It extends the uikit Prompt component with a dedicated sign-in action button. Used in blog contexts to gate interactions like comments or reactions behind authentication. Import: import {PromptSignIn} from '@gravity-ui/blog-constructor';

PromptSignIn props: onClickSignIn (React.EventHandler<React.SyntheticEvent>) callback when the sign-in button is clicked; actions (PromptAction[]) custom action buttons, defaults to a single sign-in button; className (string) additional CSS class; message (string) prompt message text, defaults to a localized sign-in prompt; title (string) prompt title text. Extends Partial<PromptProps> from uikit.
PromptSignIn usage to gate blog interactions behind authentication.
code_examples:
<PromptSignIn
  title="Members only"
  message="Sign in to leave a comment"
  onClickSignIn={handleSignIn}
/>
